title: Progress EK5553P Illumi Glass Kettle – Electric Kettle with 1.7 L Capacity, BPA-Free, Boil-Dry Sensor, Auto-Shut Off, Anti Limescale Filter, 360° Swivel Base, Otter Controller, Blue LED Lights, 2200W
features: Perfect for a quick morning coffee or afternoon tea with friends, boil your water in style with this Progress Illumi glass kettle.
The anti-limescale filter automatically prevents build up of limescale and features a 360° swivel base for left and right-handed use.
Powered by 2200 W, this kettle makes quick work of boiling your water and has a 1.7 litre capacity to accommodate all households.
This electric kettle has built-in safety features such as an auto-shut off function and boil-dry sensors for added peace of mind.
Designed to add a touch of style to your home, this kettle has blue LED illumination lights to suit a range of kitchen aesthetics.
description: Product Description Illumination Glass Kettle Make your morning tea or coffee with ease using the Progress Illumi Glass Kettle. Perfect for any household, this electric kettle has a 1.7L capacity and blue LED illumination lights to add a touch of style to your kitchen. The boil-dry sensor and auto-shut-off features offer an added measure of safety for peace of mind when not in use. The anti-limescale filter prevents build-up of limescale whilst the 360° swivel base ensures it can be used by both left and right-handed users. Previous page Glass Design Boasting a transparent glass body, this kettle will look great in any kitchen setting 1.7L Capacity With 2200W, the kettle has a 1.7 litre capacity so you can boil once for multiple cups. Versatile Boiling Suitable for coffee, tea, pasta water, hot chocolate & herbal teas Illuminate When Boiling It also has a 360° swivel base making it suitable for left and right handed users. Limescale Free Includes a boil-dry sensor and anti scale filter in the spout to prevent any from entering drinks. Next page 1 Glass Design 2 1.7L 3 Coffee Or Tea 4 Blue Illumination 5 Limescale Free Est.1931 Innovation & Progression Established in 1931, Lancashire brand Progress has always strived to be at the forefront of style and design, whilst never forgetting what makes a kitchen the heart of any home. The focus of innovation and progressions has enabled Progress to now provide an extensive range of products with a modern, clean-cut twist. A classic brand with a 21st century feel, Progress offers everything a kitchen could possibly need.
